Title: So Rich, So Pretty
Comment: Mickey Avalon might be the cringiest rapper I’ve ever listened to.  I need a shower every time I listen to him.  “What makes him cringe?” you ask.  The lyrics to this song are on the mild side for him; listen to “My Dick,” “Super Atomic,” or “Red Light District.”  Look at, literally, any picture of him online.  And for a real kicker, listen to his album where he reads nursery rhymes.  These will collectively help you understand his cringe-worthiness
